title: kubernetes provider extension refinement
description: Validates the content of `extensions.kubernetes` in an IaP document. Refinements are non-normative hints consumed by this mapping under the ch. 11 non-interference rule: they can never alter IaP semantics, only refine how the kubernetes realization places or sizes what the core intent already declares.

version.description: Extension namespace version registered at document level.

resources.description: Per-resource refinement hints, keyed by document resource identifier (DNS-label grammar).

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace the realized resources are placed in (DNS label).

storageClassHint.description: Preferred StorageClass for operator-managed volumes. A hint only: the mapping's encryption demand always prevails over the hint.

replicasHint.description: Preferred replica count for the realized workload. Never lowers a floor derived from availability intent.
